description:
You are acting as a container-operations engineer who has just received three
  micro-service runtime logs.  
  Everything you need is already in the container’s home folder:

    /home/user/microservices/logs/serviceA.log
    /home/user/microservices/logs/serviceB.log
    /home/user/microservices/logs/serviceC.log

  1. Summarise errors & warnings  
     a. Scan every line of the three *.log* files.  
     b. Count, **per service AND per calendar-day**, how many lines contain the
        literal strings “ERROR” and “WARNING”.  
     c. Write the result to a single CSV file called  
        /home/user/microservices/reports/combined_error_warning_summary.csv

        The CSV **must use this exact layout and order** so that automated
        tests can diff it byte-for-byte:

            service,date,error_count,warning_count
            serviceA,2023-09-14,1,1
            serviceA,2023-09-15,1,0
            serviceA,2023-09-16,0,0
            serviceB,2023-09-13,0,1
            serviceB,2023-09-14,1,0
            serviceB,2023-09-15,1,0
            serviceB,2023-09-16,0,1
            serviceC,2023-09-14,0,1
            serviceC,2023-09-15,2,0
            serviceC,2023-09-16,0,1

        • The header row is mandatory.  
        • Rows must be sorted first by service name (lexicographically) and
          second by date (oldest-to-newest).  
        • Use Unix line-feeds (LF) only; no CRLF.

  2. Archive pre-2023-09-15 log lines in parallel  
     a. Extract only the lines that are **strictly earlier than
        2023-09-15** from each *.log* file.  
     b. Save those extracted lines to individual files named  
        serviceA.pre_2023-09-15.log  
        serviceB.pre_2023-09-15.log  
        serviceC.pre_2023-09-15.log  
        in a new folder: /home/user/microservices/archive  
     c. Package the three new *.log* files into a single compressed archive  
        /home/user/microservices/archive/logs_pre_20230915.tar.gz  
        (tar + gzip).  
     d. The original log files in /home/user/microservices/logs **must stay
        intact**; do not edit, move or delete them.  
     e. Perform the extraction step for the three services **concurrently**
        (e.g. GNU parallel, background subshells, or xargs -P).  The exact
        commands are up to you.

     The archive will be tested by running:  
       tar -tzf /home/user/microservices/archive/logs_pre_20230915.tar.gz  
     and must list exactly these three internal paths (no sub-directories
     inside the tar):

        serviceA.pre_2023-09-15.log
        serviceB.pre_2023-09-15.log
        serviceC.pre_2023-09-15.log

  3. Produce a very small process log  
     Create /home/user/microservices/reports/processing_steps.log that
     consists of **exactly two lines** (include no timestamps, no extra
     whitespace, no trailing spaces):

        ARCHIVING_STEP_COMPLETED
        SUMMARY_STEP_COMPLETED

  4. Notes & constraints  
     • Do not run anything as root; your current non-privileged user can write
       under /home/user.  
     • Feel free to create any temporary files/directories but clean-up is not
       required.  
     • The automated grader will fail the task if any of the following are
       true:  
       – The summary CSV deviates by even one character.  
       – The tar archive is missing or contains extra/incorrect files.  
       – processing_steps.log does not match the two-line spec exactly.  
       – Any of the original log files have been modified, deleted, or moved.

  When you are done, you should have created exactly three new artefacts:

     /home/user/microservices/reports/combined_error_warning_summary.csv
     /home/user/microservices/archive/logs_pre_20230915.tar.gz
     /home/user/microservices/reports/processing_steps.log

  Work step-by-step in the terminal, using parallelism where requested, and
  verify your outputs before finishing.
truth:
<!--
      The grader relies on the following pre-existing environment and on the
      exact artefacts the agent must create.
  -->

  <!-- Pre-populated log files -->
  <initial_files>
    <file path="/home/user/microservices/logs/serviceA.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-14 10:15:32 INFO Starting service
2023-09-14 10:17:02 ERROR Failed to connect to DB
2023-09-14 11:05:12 WARNING Low memory
2023-09-15 09:45:00 INFO Health check passed
2023-09-15 12:08:45 ERROR Timeout while processing request
2023-09-16 13:00:00 INFO Shutdown signal received
]]></file>

    <file path="/home/user/microservices/logs/serviceB.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-13 08:00:00 INFO Starting service
2023-09-13 08:30:21 WARNING Cache miss
2023-09-14 09:00:02 ERROR Unhandled exception
2023-09-15 10:05:05 ERROR Null pointer
2023-09-16 11:11:11 WARNING High latency
2023-09-16 12:00:00 INFO Rolling update completed
]]></file>

    <file path="/home/user/microservices/logs/serviceC.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-14 14:22:10 INFO Init
2023-09-14 14:23:00 WARNING Deprecated API
2023-09-15 16:45:30 ERROR Disk full
2023-09-15 18:00:00 ERROR Permission denied
2023-09-16 19:30:30 WARNING Configuration reload
2023-09-16 20:00:00 INFO Done
]]></file>
  </initial_files>

  <!-- Artefacts the agent must produce -->
  <expected_outputs>

    <file path="/home/user/microservices/reports/combined_error_warning_summary.csv"><![CDATA[
service,date,error_count,warning_count
serviceA,2023-09-14,1,1
serviceA,2023-09-15,1,0
serviceA,2023-09-16,0,0
serviceB,2023-09-13,0,1
serviceB,2023-09-14,1,0
serviceB,2023-09-15,1,0
serviceB,2023-09-16,0,1
serviceC,2023-09-14,0,1
serviceC,2023-09-15,2,0
serviceC,2023-09-16,0,1
]]></file>

    <!-- Individual extracted files (must be inside the tar archive) -->
    <file path="/home/user/microservices/archive/serviceA.pre_2023-09-15.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-14 10:15:32 INFO Starting service
2023-09-14 10:17:02 ERROR Failed to connect to DB
2023-09-14 11:05:12 WARNING Low memory
]]></file>

    <file path="/home/user/microservices/archive/serviceB.pre_2023-09-15.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-13 08:00:00 INFO Starting service
2023-09-13 08:30:21 WARNING Cache miss
2023-09-14 09:00:02 ERROR Unhandled exception
]]></file>

    <file path="/home/user/microservices/archive/serviceC.pre_2023-09-15.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-14 14:22:10 INFO Init
2023-09-14 14:23:00 WARNING Deprecated API
]]></file>

    <!-- The tarball must contain ONLY the three .log files above with no leading slashes -->
    <tar path="/home/user/microservices/archive/logs_pre_20230915.tar.gz">
      serviceA.pre_2023-09-15.log
      serviceB.pre_2023-09-15.log
      serviceC.pre_2023-09-15.log
    </tar>

    <!-- Simple two-line process indicator -->
    <file path="/home/user/microservices/reports/processing_steps.log"><![CDATA[
ARCHIVING_STEP_COMPLETED
SUMMARY_STEP_COMPLETED
]]></file>

  </expected_outputs>
